scope_summary.problem: requirements.md: 8 untested modules (error, state, ratelimit, revocation, metrics, scheduler/delay, scheduler/memory_backend, scheduler/cloud_scheduler_backend) need unit + integration tests
scope_summary.success_criteria: Each module has #[cfg(test)] with happy path, edge case, and error tests. Integration tests use real NATS/Redis. Cloud backends use homebrew-installable emulators. Metrics tested both with and without feature flag. → pre_clarifications answers

boundary.in_scope: 10 change specs (error-types, task-state-machine, ratelimit, revocation, metrics, scheduler-delay, scheduler-memory-backend, scheduler-cloud-backend, result-backend, worker) → spec_plan
boundary.out_of_scope: No changes to existing source code. No new features. Tests only.
boundary.constraints: Tests must compile without external dependencies for unit tests. Integration tests requiring infra should use #[ignore] or feature gates.
